catalog_content:
Item Name: O'Creme Lily-of-the-Valley Gumpaste Sugar Flower Spray 6 Inch - Edible Flowers for Cake Decorating - Sugar Paste Flower Decorations for Cake, Cupcake Toppers - Set of 3 White with Buds Bullet Point 1: BEAUTIFUL EDIBLE SUGAR PASTE FLOWERS - Our edible flowers are made with petals of 100% edible sugar paste (gum paste). The petals are attached to non-edible wire stems and artificial stamens that complete the realistic appearance. Add a splash of color to your baked goods! Bullet Point 2: ADD A TOUCH OF MAGIC TO CAKES & CONFECTIONS - Elevating the ordinary into something truly extraordinary. Intricately patterned and delicately shaped, our elegant edible blossoms add a flowery touch of eye-catching magic to your cakes, cupcakes, and confections. Bullet Point 3: HIGHLY DETAILED AND LIFELIKE REALISM - Cherry-Blossom Spray measures 3 inch x 11 inch, the vibrant flower featuring details such as veined flower petals, ruffled petal edges, coloring and shading, varied petal layers and detailed centers for professional results that are next to impossible to replicate at home. Bullet Point 4: KOSHER HIGH QUALITY INGREDIENTS - Kosher Certified. Our high quality edible petals are carefully crafted from confectioners sugar, egg white powder, distilled water, corn starch, CMC powder and food coloring. Made with love for you and your loved ones to enjoy on a special day. Bullet Point 5: READY TO USE: SAVES YOU TIME AND EFFORT - Made with the same care you'd give your start-from-scratch gumpaste cake decorating flowers, but ours save you time. Turn basic to beautiful! Perfect for weddings, birthdays, anniversaries, baby showers or any upscale event. Product Description: O'Creme Gumpaste Flower Spray
  • Part edible, part not, with petals made of gumpaste
  • Edible parts of the spray made of food coloring, confectioners sugar, egg white powder, distilled water, corn starch and CMC powder
  • Made in nut-free facility
  • Lifelike spray whose petals are gumpaste and edible
  • A flower spray detailed enough to stand alone as a decoration by itself or to complement desserts at banquets

    Store in a cool dry place. Value: 3.0 Unit: Count
overall_summary: Affordable, ready-to-use decorative edible flowers for cake and confectionery applications. Positioned as a time-saving alternative to homemade gumpaste flowers, with a focus on realism and aesthetic appeal. Kosher certification and nut-free facility claims may attract health-conscious or religiously observant buyers, but lack of premium branding or organic claims suggests mid-range pricing relative to specialty baking supplies. Bulk set of 3 units offers value for frequent decorators.
